title: Reintroduce Custom Email Addresses for Individual Pulses
excerpt:

posts.author: jmarjenka (Joshua Marjenka)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you for bringing back custom email addresses for emailing pulses to boards. We would also love to have the ability to again use custom emails for individual pulses.

Our use case is that we have a Client Success and Risk Management Board, where each client is represented as a pulse. We would like to be able to quickly and easily send updates to each pulse from our email. We previously configured custom email addresses that used the client ID, so anyone in the company would know what email address to use without needing to look it up. The automatically generated email addresses are so complex that you have to go to the pulse to find the email address in the first place.

Thank you for your consideration!

-Joshua
